decks.notes: This UR Aggro deck is focused on quickly dealing damage to the opponent with cheap spells and efficient creatures. The deck includes a mix of direct damage spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, along with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Valley Floodcaller. The deck also includes some card draw and tempo plays like Opt and Sleight of Hand to help maintain pressure on the opponent. The inclusion of a few versatile spells like Prismari Charm and Spell Pierce provide additional options for disrupting the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By playing low-cost creatures like Colorstorm Stallion and Slickshot Show-Off, combined with burst damage from cards like Burst Lightning and Flow State, the deck aims to apply pressure early in the game. The deck also includes a mix of card draw and control elements to maintain tempo and outpace the opponent. Boomerang Basics and Secret Identity provide additional disruption to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while Stormchaser's Talent offers additional damage and card advantage. Multiversal Passage helps fix mana and ensure consistency in casting spells.

The key concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence with efficient low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, supported by ramp from Llanowar Elves and Mightform Harmonizer. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggressive creatures and powerful combat tricks like Bushwhack and Earthbender Ascension. Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Mossborn Hydra provide additional threats while Erode helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also utilizes land synergy with cards like Hushwood Verge and Escape Tunnel for additional advantage.

This deck focuses on efficiently using creatures with low mana costs to apply pressure and overwhelm the opponent early in the game. By leveraging the synergy between creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo with pump spells like Mightform Harmonizer and Earthbender Ascension, the deck aims to quickly build a formidable board presence and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam and Keen-Eyed Curator provide additional utility and card advantage to keep the aggression going.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and counterspells. It aims to outvalue the opponent by constantly replenishing resources and answering threats efficiently. The key strategy involves setting up a strong board presence while disrupting the opponent's game plan. The deck utilizes a variety of versatile spells and lands to ensure flexibility in different matchups. Overall, the goal is to grind out incremental advantages and eventually overwhelm the opponent with powerful late-game spells and card advantage.

The deck focuses on tempo and aggression by utilizing flying creatures and spells that disrupt the opponent's game plan. By quickly deploying threats like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, the deck aims to pressure the opponent and close out the game before they can stabilize. Cards like Starfield Shepherd and Cosmogrand Zenith provide additional value and resilience to removal spells. The inclusion of cards like Springleaf Drum and Erode help to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the deck aims to win the game through aggressive flying creatures and disruptive spells.

The key concept of this deck is to maintain a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle by utilizing a combination of creatures with low mana cost and spells that can control the board while dealing damage to the opponent. By constantly pressuring the opponent with quick and efficient plays, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own game plan. The inclusion of cards like Burst Lightning, Opt, and Boomerang Basics further supports the aggressive strategy by providing both direct damage and board manipulation. The deck also includes a few utility cards like Secret Identity and Get Out to disrupt the opponent's strategy when needed.

The main focus of this deck is to rapidly overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By utilizing cards like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off alongside Burst Lightning and Opt, the deck aims to quickly deal damage and control the board. Colorstorm Stallion can provide a powerful late-game threat, while cards like Boomerang Basics and Sleight of Hand help maintain tempo and card advantage. Utilizing a mix of evasion and direct damage, this UR Aggro deck seeks to apply constant pressure and outpace opponents before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using a combination of card draw, removal spells, and board wipes to disrupt your opponent's strategy. It also includes some versatile spells like Tablet of Discovery and Consult the Star Charts to help you dig for the cards you need. The mana base is optimized to ensure you have access to the colors you need for your spells. By managing the board and card advantage, you can outlast your opponent and secure victory.

This Golgari Aggro deck focuses on putting pressure on the opponent by quickly deploying creatures like Badgermole Cub, Frenzied Baloth, and Ouroboroid. The deck also includes powerful spells like Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff to control the board and push for damage. The mana base includes dual lands like Blooming Marsh and Overgrown Tomb, along with ramp options like Llanowar Elves and Restless Cottage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and removal spells while maintaining a solid mana base for consistency.

The focus of this deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures and use cheap spells to control the board and push through damage. Utilizing cards like Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off for early aggression, alongside Burst Lightning and Spell Pierce for removal and disruption. The deck also includes bounce effects like Boomerang Basics and Get Out to keep opponents off balance. Stormchaser's Talent and Flow State provide additional reach and card advantage. The mana base is optimized for quick access to both Blue and Red mana sources for maximum efficiency.

The deck aims to quickly ramp up mana to play Omniscience and then combo off by casting multiple spells for free, utilizing cards like Ashling, Rekindled and Formidable Speaker to control the board and deal damage. The deck also includes card draw and search spells like Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up to find key pieces for the combo. The mana base includes lands that produce multiple colors to support the spells in the deck. Overall, the strategy revolves around casting powerful spells for free and overwhelming the opponent with a flurry of actions.

The key concept of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and burn spells. The deck focuses on being able to quickly deal damage to the opponent while maintaining board presence with efficient creatures and removal spells. The combination of pump effects and direct damage spells allows for unexpected bursts of damage, keeping the opponent on their toes. The mana base includes a mix of dual lands to ensure smooth mana curve and consistency in casting spells. The goal is to outpace the opponent and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on fast creature deployment and buffing their creatures with spells to overwhelm the opponent quickly. Badgermole Cub, Sazh's Chocobo, and Mossborn Hydra provide strong creatures while Mightform Harmonizer and Dyadrine, Synthesis Amalgam boost their power. Earthbender Ascension and Bushwhack give additional buffs for a final push, while Erode helps to control the opponent's board. The mana base is designed for consistency and to ensure the deck can deploy its threats quickly. This deck aims to win the game before the opponent can establish their strategy.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with low-cost creatures and mana ramp, then buffing them with various spells and abilities to overwhelm the opponent. The synergy between creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, combined with spells like Erode and Earthbender Ascension, allows for fast and aggressive plays. The inclusion of cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Mossborn Hydra adds versatility and power to the strategy. Lastly, the mana base is optimized for consistent access to all required colors and resources for a smooth gameplay experience.

This Simic Aggro deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with Llanowar Elves and Gene Pollinator to cast powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth and Ouroboroid. Quantum Riddler helps control the board while Mockingbird provides evasion for your creatures. Brightglass Gearhulk and Goldvein Hydra offer additional threats that can quickly end the game. Nature's Rhythm helps ensure you hit your land drops and maintain a fast pace. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm your opponent with a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells.
